title: PM Stakeholder Time Protection And Acceleration Lane
objective: Record stakeholder time and relay burden as primary operating constraints for the Project Miner PM lane, while preserving governance around production data, schema, auth, ingress, deployments, AI business mutation, workbook macro execution, and new service admission.
active_role: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator / Stakeholder Burden Reduction Coordinator
orchestration_inputs: The stakeholder clarified that Project Miner PM modernization must account for severe real-world time constraints across field, estimating, project management, and operations responsibilities.
The stakeholder needs the PM workflow and AI orchestration layer to become streamlined and efficient enough that the project can progress without requiring large unpaid coordination effort.
The stakeholder wants to preserve the existing governance and framework while creating a lane that brings practical workflow and orchestration reductions to fruition.
The current Temp Power timeline makes reducing relay burden and implementation friction a delivery requirement, not a convenience.
constrained_outputs: Add an active PM stakeholder time-protection and acceleration lane under docs/operations.
Update the Temp Power delivery plan so stakeholder time, relay burden, and workflow friction are treated as primary constraints.
Update the delegated authority protocol with a stakeholder time-protection and PM acceleration rule.
Link the acceleration lane from the Project Miner intake workflow.
Preserve PM Lane 032 as the next product tranche: Temp Power Import Candidate Review.
not_allowed: No Excel MCP production runtime dependency.
handoff_target: Delegated Technical Repo Authority / PM Runtime Product Coordinator
sql_permission_note: This acceleration overlay does not authorize SQL writes, schema migration, live data mutation, seed replay into Supabase, production import, workbook writeback, macro execution, Render deployment, Vercel promotion, auth widening, ingress widening, package dependency addition, Excel MCP runtime dependency, durable AI queue admission, ai_tasks ownership, Dataverse import reopening, schedule mutation, assignment mutation, status mutation, AI helper mutation, AI service admission widening, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
